title: Tern - no charge case screens (Onboarding, Supported devices list)
scenario: Onboarding flow for Voyager Free 60 Charge Case lacks smart charge case screens when started from supported devices list
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is currently connected.
3. On the Home screen, tap the 'Supported Devices' or 'Add Device' option to open the list of supported devices.
4. From the list, select 'Voyager Free 60 Charge Case' (not the Voyager Free 60+ variant).
5. Tap to start the onboarding flow for the selected device.
6. Observe the screens displayed during the onboarding process.
expected: The onboarding flow should include smart charge case screens that guide the user through setup and features specific to the Voyager Free 60 Charge Case.
